text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 09. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
